{{Infobox artifact
| name = Starlotus
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Starlotus]] is a material intended for [[Coppers]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Starlotus]] is a flower used to solidify foundation in a core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Starlotus]] bud can be consumed to gain power.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
